title: Korbond Non-Roll Elastic - 110377
features: NON-ROLL: This Elastic is strong and is designed to hold its shape when tension is applied, so the Elastic will not roll when stretched, and will return to it's original form without distortion
MACHINE WASHABLE: Korbond Non Roll Elastic is machine washable up to 30 degrees
SUITABLE FOR: Suitable for waistbands, cuffs, and craft projects requiring strong elastic
description: Product Description Korbond Non-Roll Elastic - 110377 Safety Warning Take care when using. Not suitable for unsupervised children.
